## Summary
<!-- 1-3 bullets describing what changed and why. -->

## Test plan
- [ ] `npm run dev` — exercised the changed feature in a browser
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` — clean
- [ ] `npm run build` — succeeds
- [ ] DevTools Console — no errors

## License compliance (only if audio changed)
- [ ] New / changed audio is **CC0 1.0** or **CC BY 4.0** (no CC BY-SA / NC / ND)
- [ ] Per-file entry added to `public/assets/LICENSES.json`
- [ ] `manifest.json` variant's `license` field points to the new key
- [ ] `npm run audio:audit` — clean
- [ ] `npm run audio:credits` ran and `CREDITS.md` is committed
